raw_title: Performative Propaganda Engagement: How Celebrity Fans Engage with State Propaganda on Weibo
title_en: Performative Propaganda Engagement: How Celebrity Fans Engage with State Propaganda on Weibo
title_zh: 表演性宣传参与：名人粉丝如何在微博上与国家宣传互动
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了名人粉丝在微博上如何参与国家宣传内容。它关注粉丝的互动行为是否具有表演性质，以及这种参与如何影响宣传效果。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how celebrity fans engage with state propaganda content on Weibo. It focuses on whether fans' interactions are performative and how this engagement affects propaganda effectiveness.
research_direction_zh: 社交媒体上的政治传播与粉丝文化研究，关注数字时代宣传策略与公众互动的动态关系。
research_direction_en: Research on political communication and fan culture on social media, focusing on the dynamics between propaganda strategies and public engagement in the digital age.
